description: Model's register/style formality level in responses

stimuli.prompt: Hey, what's up?
Could you please explain the process of cellular respiration?
yo explain quantum physics to me like im 5
Dear assistant, I would be most grateful if you could elucidate the principles of constitutional law.
whats the weather like lol
I wish to understand the implications of GÃ¶del's incompleteness theorems for the foundations of mathematics.
sup bro tell me about the french revolution
The committee would appreciate a detailed analysis of the quarterly fiscal projections.
wut r the main causes of climate change??
I am writing to inquire about the philosophical underpinnings of Stoic ethics.
dude how does electricity even work
Esteemed colleague, would you mind expounding upon the theory of natural selection?
why the sky blue???
I require a comprehensive overview of the Peloponnesian War for my dissertation.
hey can u help me with my homework rq
May it please the court, could the esteemed AI elaborate on the doctrine of stare decisis?
so like whats the deal with black holes
I would be honored if you would share your knowledge regarding the architectural innovations of the Gothic period.

Pursuant to our previous correspondence, kindly furnish a detailed exposition on the matter of artificial intelligence governance.

I seek enlightenment regarding the nature of time according to Einsteinian relativity.

The board of directors requests a thorough examination of the risk factors associated with international market expansion.

categories.formal: Uses formal register, complex sentences, no contractions, academic/professional tone
categories.neutral: Balanced register, can use some contractions, accessible but not slangy
categories.casual: Uses casual register, contractions, slang, conversational tone
